raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Legislature has proposed a comprehensive package of bills aimed at addressing organized retail theft.",
    "These bills will enhance law enforcement's ability to combat retail crime and improve public safety.",
    "The proposed legislation aims to provide effective tools for prosecutors and judges to address retail theft.",
    "California's Senate and Assembly are committed to ensuring rapid legislative action on public safety measures.",
    "The organized retail theft problem in California is serious and impacts both shoppers and retailers.",
    "Law enforcement and district attorneys will be given new tools to hold criminals accountable without reverting to mass incarceration.",
    "The California Highway Patrol's Organized Retail Theft Task Force has led to significant investigations and arrests since its establishment.",
    "Organized retail theft is using online marketplaces to sell large quantities of stolen goods.",
    "The proposed legislation will hold online marketplaces accountable for the legality of their sellers.",
    "The California retail theft legislation package aims to create a retail crime restraining order to discourage organized theft.",
    "Simple legislative fixes will provide District Attorneys across California with necessary tools to convict criminals.",
    "The legislation seeks to address underlying causes of crime, including drug use, in response to the opioid epidemic."
  ]
}
```
